description_long: This is a rectangular, wall-mounted vending machine with a weathered, off-white exterior covered in graffiti, stickers, and signs of wear. The front face features three vertical glass windows, each displaying different products, with colorful labels and graphics visible behind the glass. Below each window is a red and black rotary knob and a rectangular product retrieval slot, indicating a mechanical, coin-operated mechanism. The sides and top are plain, beige-colored metal with some minor scuffs and discoloration, while the back is flat and unadorned. The overall construction appears robust, with metal as the primary material, and the machine is designed for outdoor urban environments. The visual style and wear suggest it has been in public use for some time, likely dispensing small items such as gum or toys.
description: A weathered, graffiti-covered, wall-mounted vending machine with three glass product windows, rotary knobs, and retrieval slots on the front. The sides and top are plain beige metal, showing signs of age and public use.
description_view_0: The front view shows three glass windows with visible products, rotary knobs, and retrieval slots, all set in a graffiti-marked, off-white metal face.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, beige metal surface with minor scuffs and no interactive features visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays a flat, unadorned beige metal panel, showing no openings, windows, or interactive elements.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain beige metal surface with some discoloration and no interactive features.
attribute_display_panel: Three vertical glass windows on the front, each approximately 10x30 cm, displaying product labels and contents.
attribute_payment_interface: Coin slots located above each rotary knob on the front panel, no bill acceptor or card reader visible.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Three rotary knobs, one below each product window, used for product selection and dispensing.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: Three rectangular retrieval slots, one below each rotary knob, each about 8x8 cm, with a small flap.
attribute_branding_or_signage: No clear branding or logos; front is covered with various stickers, graffiti, and some faded printed instructions.
